name: little-leaders
description: Vashti Harrison's Little Leaders: Bold Women in Black History — celebrate 40 trailblazing black women who broke barriers in science, arts, sports, politics, and activism, told through accessible mini-biographies that inspire the next generation
useCase: Helps anyone find inspiration in the stories of 40 bold black women who changed history — from Harriet Tubman to Mae Jemison to Octavia Butler — and learn about determination, talent, resilience, and the power of representation.
knownRisks: The book profiles 40 specific women — there are many other incredible black women whose stories are not covered
